name: MSc Computer Science
description: Oxford's MSc in Computer Science provides advanced training in the foundational areas of computer science while allowing specialization in areas such as machine learning, computational biology, and theoretical computer science.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

name: MBA
description: MIT Sloan's MBA program combines rigorous academics with hands-on learning, entrepreneurship focus, and access to MIT's broader innovation ecosystem. Students gain skills in analytics, leadership, and strategic thinking.

name: Bachelor of Engineering
description: U of T Engineering offers a comprehensive undergraduate program with specializations in electrical, mechanical, civil, computer, and chemical engineering. Strong industry connections provide excellent co-op and internship opportunities.
requirements: High school diploma with strong math and science

name: Master of Data Science
description: Melbourne's Master of Data Science equips students with advanced skills in statistics, machine learning, and data analysis. The program emphasizes practical application through industry projects and research opportunities.

name: MSc Mechanical Engineering
description: TUM's MSc in Mechanical Engineering offers world-class education in automotive engineering, aerospace, robotics, and manufacturing. Strong ties with German industry giants provide exceptional career opportunities.
requirements: Bachelor's in Mechanical Engineering or related field
GPA equivalent to German 2.5 or better

name: MSc Computer Science
description: Trinity's MSc in Computer Science offers specializations in data science, intelligent systems, and graphics & vision. Located in Europe's tech hub, students benefit from proximity to major tech companies like Google, Meta, and Microsoft.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
